title: Cobblemon Whiteout
description: What if your player got KO'd when your Cobblemon team wiped out, like in the games?
body:
# Whiteout

v1.6-1.2.0

[Links](https://cobble.timinc.us/?loader=all&version=1.6&id=whiteout)

## About

What if your player got KO'd when your Cobblemon team wiped out, like in the games?

## Testing

Pick your starter, run `/pokespawn mewtwo level=100`, challenge it to a battle, whiteout, and then die. Easy peasy!

## Applications

If you want a hardcore vibe to your battling, this is here for it. You can also make players die for multiple reasons, including:

- Having all of their Pokémon faint, whether in or out of battle.
- Losing a Pokémon battle.
- Fleeing a Pokémon battle.

Each one can be toggled in the config.

## Player Help

[Config Options](https://www.notion.so/Config-Options-22516db299a68058acc7faa143d3a769?pvs=21)

## Status

The mod is currently in public release. Come visit us [at the Discord](https://discord.gg/WKAR27SdSv) to talk, ask questions, and give feedback about the mod!
